text.title: Is Italian Food Really That Good??
text.u: buongiorno everyone bonjourno
so we are here making a very
serious vlog
on a very serious question
is italian food really that good
i would say
what would you say
depends on where you go depends on where
you go we've been here for about three
weeks now
and we've tried a variety of places as
you can imagine
and we've gone off of our research and
the suggestions of locals and
suggestions of people who've been to
italy before that tell you this is the
place you got to go okay but let me tell
you there's been one place that we have
measured all other places by since we've
been here
and we haven't been there since the very
first day we got here but we're going to
go back and we're going to put it to the
test because i've got a theory about
getting away from the touristy sites to
find the best food do you remember what
the name of the place was because i
can't ever pronounce it what was the
name of the place
that was the name of the place and i
think gel cimino is actually the name of
the story that's the name of the street
it's all yeah and it was recommended to
us by our airbnb host that's right
that's right a local a roman
so
we ate there our very first night in
rome like terry said we have
we thought it was the best pasta we've
ever had and we're going to see if that
still holds true today we're going to
try a variety of other foods but it's
very important to start with pasta and
with lunch and that's what we're going
to do we're going to bring you along
so let's go
we are crystal and terry and in the
spring of 2021 we decided to leave our
full-time jobs and dedicate one year of
our life to full-time travel
since then we've been driving all around
the u.s and have had some really great
adventures
but now it's time for a change for the
next several months we will be exploring
some of the great sites and cities of
italy we are very excited about this
next chapter in our lives and we hope
that you'll subscribe to our channel and
join us
as we leave the life we've always known
to live the life of our dreams
[Music]
[Applause]
[Music]
[Applause]
[Music]
do
[Music]
[Music]
so we just came out of
asteria
the review as you can imagine it's
fantastic yes this is
the best pasta that we have had in rome
bar none yeah we ate here three weeks
ago like we said never forgot it came
back
still the best deal still the best still
the best i thought i was gonna cry
he pretty much did cry was that crying
oh my gosh it's the whole roman
experience
it's a mom and pop shop it is they've
been there for a long time 150 years 150
years not just these people obviously
the people that are here now it's like
husband and wife our waitress lady she's
so sweet she
she explains everything to you in like
mime
yeah okay
like charade style cause she knows as
much english as we know italian exactly
which is uh actually we might know more
italian than she knows english but
that's fine because it's all food talk
and we know food talk yeah so it was
fantastic such a great little place so
cute inside yeah it's probably a good
idea to make reservations we snuck in
right when they opened for lunch so we
were fine but she's she's filling out
reservation cards like crazy he said
she's got like a stack this thick of
reservations
i'm not claiming that this place is a
hidden gem from tourists because their
number one 2021 trip advisor place to go
but it is fantastic it is authentic and
the food is delicious come here oh yeah
come here absolutely
best place
there you go
we'll see you at the next spot
[Music]
well guys
our stop after lunch was a gelato shop
called gioliti
and um we're not quite sure why they put
the foil on top but it makes for a
really good reveal because watch this
[Music]
i got
wild cherry
pistachio
vanilla
and we were told by a true italian that
you cannot get gelato without cream on
top so this is like a super yummy
delicious whipped cream made in-house
and it's awesome
this place is legit try it out if you're
here
okay so i know i kind of rushed through
the whole
let's taste this gelato thing but it's
because it was melting all over us um
but terry got chocolate lemon and mango
and what we've been told is that this
gelato shop
uses only
real fruit sugar and water to make their
fruit gelatos their gelato is delicious
terry already finished his
but i'm a little slower so
here's to some delicious gelato in rome
[Music]
well good morning everyone
today we're heading down to a local
patisserie
to have a typical italian breakfast
now our lunch in gelato places we had
sampled those once before so we had high
hopes
this place we haven't researched it no
one recommended it but we've passed by
several times and it just looks oh it
just looks cute as crystal would say so
we had to stop in and give it a check
they have a variety of stuff in the case
so many things to choose from i thought
this was a cannoli it's not a cannoli
it's a puff pastry
with a bit of chocolate
shoved inside right there so
are very crisp
very chewy
next though
i'm going to try this little puff pastry
i thought it was lemon he made sure to
tell me nerf crema
wow
that's really good it's a very
soft
wet
pastry bottom the creme is really really
good
really delicious very very sweet
and of course i'm healthy because
there's a bit of fruit on top
so
that'll help me stay healthy
this place is awesome as terry already
told you
and i'm just gonna show you what i got
so i got a kiwi with a cream tart
look how cute
so the kiwi is really tangy
and then the cream is nice and sweet and
this tart just is like crumbly
it like flaky and crumbles in your mouth
it's like perfect the perfect bite of
all three together and then
i got
i think this is either strawberry or
raspberry i'm not totally sure but it's
like a little cheesecake i think so i'm
just gonna eat it like this
raspberry raspberry cheesecake
all of these were one euro each so i
mean for four euros how can you beat
that and they're so cute this place is
called
golden
basteria
i think
i did learn that pasta is not only what
you think of as pasta like flour noodles
it's pasta also refers to
pastry so that's why sometimes you'll
see bastecheria
and it really means patisserie so there
you go italian 101
[Music]
so far we've given you a typical italian
lunch with pasta and typical italian
breakfast with patisserie and even
a typical italian treat like gelato but
what are we going to do tonight babe
well guys this is our last night in rome
and instead of doing the typical we have
found
a barbecue joint
it's right in our neighborhood we've got
great reviews from our airbnb host so
yeah we're going to give it a shot how
many times you get barbecue in rome
well
not too many for me but we're gonna get
some tonight yep so let's go try it out
yeah let's do it
[Music]
[Music]
the idea for mr doyle's real smokehouse
barbecue came about when the owner took
a trip to the united states
he visited with various barbecue
restaurants and really was fascinated by
the barbecue style of cooking
he thought it would be a great idea to
combine that american style of
barbecuing with fresh italian meats
and i for one can verify
this was a wonderfully delicious idea
[Music]
so
[Music]
well guys that's going to wrap it up for
us and like crystal said at the
beginning
is italian food really that good it just
depends on where you eat
i would say yeah stay away from the
touristy sites a lot of options good
views could be good service but
you're probably going to pay a bit more
may not be the best quality now the
places we've taken you to
we're at least a mile or two away from
any major touristy site
minus the gelato these are locally ran
places so just check around do your
research
it's all pretty good but some of it's
better than others and what about
tonight
um i'm gonna have to give this barbecue
a thumbs up
um it might just be that we're like
craving a little taste at home i don't
know but i think it was really good the
ribs were like fall off the bone just
like you get back in the states yeah um
there was two types of pulled pork well
i'm sorry one was pulled pork one was
pulled beef and they were both seasoned
really good seasoned differently yeah um
a pork sausage and pork belly and i
don't think i've ever had pork belly
before but man it was really good i have
a pork belly
after eating here
yeah after this trip we're both got pork
bellies i'm a hoot
but uh
it's been fantastic bittersweet that
we're leaving rome tomorrow yeah but
don't worry we've got a lot more italian
adventures coming up for you that's
right so we'll see you on the next one
you
